entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary crop studied for productivity improvement under changing climatic conditions

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental variability and change affecting agricultural productivity in sub-Saharan Africa

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: The broad region where smallholder farmers depend on agriculture for livelihoods

entities.name: CROP MODELLING
entities.description: The general scientific approach used to inform the improvement of agricultural productivity

entities.name: APSIM
entities.description: The Agricultural Production Systems sIMulator used to assess climate change impacts on sorghum

entities.name: EARLY MATURING VARIETY
entities.description: A sorghum variety characterized by early maturity, showing high inter-annual variability under climate change

entities.name: MEDIUM MATURING VARIETY
entities.description: A sorghum variety characterized by medium maturity, showing yield gains under climate change

entities.name: MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural techniques and interventions tested to enhance crop productivity

entities.name: CROP PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events in the crop's life cycle used for model validation

entities.name: LEAF NUMBER PER PLANT
entities.description: A physical trait of the sorghum plant used for model validation

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, used as a key measure of productivity and model accuracy

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total organic matter produced by the sorghum plant

entities.name: RADIATION USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: A plant trait (RUE) that significantly influences yield changes in sorghum

entities.name: COEFFICIENT EXTINCTION
entities.description: A plant trait (Coeff_ext) affecting light absorption and yield in early maturing sorghum

entities.name: PHYLLOCHRON
entities.description: The time interval between the appearance of successive leaves (Phyllo), affecting yield in sorghum

entities.name: RCP 8.5
entities.description: A high-emission climate scenario used for projecting future yield impacts

entities.name: BAMAKO
entities.description: A specific location in Mali where sorghum yield was simulated

entities.name: KANO
entities.description: A specific location in Nigeria where sorghum yield was simulated

entities.name: SOWING DATES
entities.description: A management practice used as an adaptation strategy to optimize yield

entities.name: SUDANIAN ZONE OF WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The specific ecological zone in West Africa where the study is applicable

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: The regional focus for designing resilient and productive farming systems

entities.name: SORGHUM GERMPLASM
entities.description: The diverse genetic resources of sorghum available in the West African region
